models.label: Japanese
models.note: Multilingual streaming Zipformer (also covers ar, ru, vi, id, th, en, zh).

models.label: Arabic
models.note: Same multilingual bundle as Japanese — set SHERPA_LANGUAGE to the language you speak.

models.label: Hindi
models.note: No dedicated Hindi streaming Zipformer transducer in official asr-models releases yet. Try cloud STT (voice-agent-browser) or Bengali (bn) for South Asian speech.

models.label: Bengali (South Asia)
models.note: Closest official South Asian streaming model; not Hindi-specific.

models.label: Portuguese
models.note: No dedicated Portuguese streaming Zipformer in asr-models. Sherpa ships pt in sherpa-onnx-cohere-transcribe-14-lang-int8-2026-04-01 (different architecture — not wired to local-sherpa yet). Use cloud STT.

models.label: Italian
models.note: No dedicated Italian streaming Zipformer in asr-models. Italian is in sherpa-onnx-cohere-transcribe-14-lang-int8-2026-04-01 (not supported here yet). Use cloud STT.
